info.description: Code understanding platform with hybrid search and LLM-powered enrichments
info.title: Kodit API

get.description: List enrichments with optional filters
Get an enrichment by ID
List all pipelines with pagination

post.description: Create a new pipeline with steps

get.description: Get a pipeline with its steps and dependencies

delete.description: Delete a pipeline and all its steps

get.description: List tasks in the queue
Get a task by ID
Get all tracked Git repositories

post.description: Add a new Git repository to track

get.description: Get a repository by ID
Returns raw file content from a Git repository at a given blob reference (commit SHA, tag, or branch). Use mode=raster&page=N to get a rasterized PNG of a document page.

parameters.description: Commit SHA, tag name, or branch name
parameters.name: blob_name

parameters.description: Prefix each line with its 1-based line number
parameters.name: line_numbers

parameters.description: Output mode: 'raster' returns a PNG image of the page
parameters.name: mode

get.description: List commits for a repository
Get a commit by SHA
This endpoint has been removed. Embeddings are an internal detail of snippets and enrichments.
List enrichments for a commit

delete.description: Delete all enrichments for a commit

get.description: Get an enrichment by ID within commit context

delete.description: Delete a specific enrichment from a commit

get.description: List files for a commit
Get a file by blob SHA

post.description: Trigger a rescan of a specific commit

get.description: List code snippets for a commit (backed by enrichments)
Get current chunking configuration for a repository

put.description: Update chunking configuration for a repository

get.description: Get the pipeline assigned to a repository. Use ?include=pipeline to include the full pipeline resource.

parameters.description: Comma-separated related resources to include (e.g. pipeline)
parameters.name: include

put.description: Assign a pipeline to a repository

get.description: List recent enrichments across commits for a repository
Deprecated: use GET /api/v1/search/grep instead. Searches file contents in a repository using git grep.
Get indexing task status for a repository
Get aggregated indexing status summary for a repository

post.description: Trigger a sync (git fetch + branch scan + commit indexing) for a repository

get.description: List tags for a repository
Get a tag by name
Get current tracking configuration for a repository

put.description: Update tracking configuration for a repository

get.description: Get the wiki navigation tree (titles and paths, no content)

post.description: Delete the existing wiki and regenerate it from scratch

get.description: Get a wiki page by hierarchical path as raw markdown

post.description: Hybrid search across code snippets and enrichments

get.description: Search file contents in a repository using git grep with regex patterns

parameters.description: Maximum number of file results (default 10, max 200)
parameters.name: limit

get.description: Search code snippets using BM25 keyword matching
Returns files from a repository working copy matching a glob pattern, with file:// URIs
get.summary: List files matching a glob pattern

get.description: Search code snippets using semantic similarity
Search document pages (PDFs, etc.) using cross-modal visual similarity
List all steps with pagination
Get a step by ID

upstream_url.description: The canonical upstream URL (e.g. github.com/org/repo); falls back to remote_uri when not set

pipeline.description: Optional pipeline name; looked up by name and assigned to the repository (defaults to the system default pipeline)

upstream_url.description: Optional canonical upstream URL; used for deduplication when multiple clone URLs point to the same repo
